_README: Copy this file to <your-app-repo>/runshot/skills.config.json and fill it in. It is plain JSON (no real comments) — the _-prefixed keys are inline docs, ignored by the runner. Delete them once you understand the shape. Selectors are Playwright selectors; prefer stable [data-testid] hooks, fall back to attribute/placeholder selectors. See the plugin README for the full field reference.

walkthrough._mailCatcher: URL of a Mailpit/Inbucket-compatible mail catcher for local email capture. Supabase local dev bundles one (Mailpit on newer CLIs, Inbucket on older). Omit expectedEmails to skip capture entirely.
walkthrough._freshIdentity: Each run gets a unique identity via the {{run}} token (a per-run timestamp slug) so reruns never collide. Reference these keys as {{email}}, {{name}}, etc. in step values.
walkthrough._steps: Ordered actions. Every step also takes a screenshot, labeled NN-<route>-<state>.png. Actions: goto | fill | click | waitFor | expectText | screenshot. Common props: route, state, note (manifest label), settleMs (wait after action), fullPage (full-page screenshot). Record mode never throws; assert mode (CI) exits non-zero on any failure.
walkthrough._expectedEmails: Optional. Each entry polls the mail catcher for a message in `mailbox` whose subject contains `subjectMatch` (empty = any), captured as HTML + screenshot. Remove this block if your local flow sends no email (e.g. email-confirmation off).

_flowDoc: Optional, consumed by the flow-doc skill. Set figma.fileKey + pageName to update one Figma page in place idempotently; omit to create a new page per run.
